title: Adding Qualifier to Emails and Activities Automation
excerpt:
Hi, I’m currently trying to set up this automation: 
  
To also include the “only if response is not responded qualifier” that’s in this automation. 
  
Is this possible?

posts.author: esalinsky4 (Ethan Salinsky)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m currently trying to set up this automation:

Screenshot 2024-02-06 at 3.38.46 PM1134×123 11.2 KB

To also include the “only if response is not responded qualifier” that’s in this automation.

Screenshot 2024-02-06 at 3.39.46 PM1232×155 16.4 KB

Is this possible?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Ethan,

I am afraid it isn’t currently possible to add conditions or customise our emails and activities app recipes at this stage. That said, are these 2 different status columns that you’d like to include in the recipe?

posts.author: esalinsky4 (Ethan Salinsky)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca, no, it is the same status column. Essentially, I am trying to update their response status to responded when receiving an email. But, I do not want people who have already booked to be changed to responded as well if they send an email later on.

posts.author: gaco.com.au (Elijah Noonan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Ethan, I’d like to understand the use case so I can point you in the right direction. Could you please elaborate on why you want to do it this way?

posts.author: esalinsky4 (Ethan Salinsky)
posts.cookedHtml: I think I explained it above, but I have a board with potential clients. When they respond to my email, I want to move them to a section that is responded. However, there is another status option that is “survey booked” once they book with me. I do not want these individuals to get moved back into responded if they send me another email.
